name: gepa-t3-b-commit
description: item 23.2 candidate (b) — commit-to-edit / CAP EXPLORATION. Targets the tool-churn T3 mode (21627, 22714: made_edit=False, >=1 tool round, shaped 0.25 — explores but never commits an edit). Terse APPEND rule (rules_append → AGENTS.md) budgeting search rounds before forcing the edit. Tests whether tool-churn is a budgeting lever. Text lever only; serving stays on the frozen local Gemma.
rules_append:
# Fixing this bug

- After at most 3 `grep`/`read` calls, make your `edit`. Do not keep searching.
- Once you have located the buggy lines, edit them immediately — finding them is not the goal, fixing them is.
